basic_details.job_title: BPSSC Bihar Home Guard Company Commander Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 65 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Bihar Police Subordinate Services Commission (BPSSC) has officially released the Bihar Home Guard Company Commander Recruitment 2026 notification (Advertisement No. 08/2026) for 65 vacancies of Gulm Samadeshak (Company Commander) under the Bihar Home Guard Service Cadre, Home Department (Special Branch), Bihar, Patna. Male, female, and third-gender candidates who hold a graduation degree from a recognised university as of 01 August 2025 are eligible to apply. The online application window opens on 30 June 2026 and closes on 30 July 2026. The application fee is ₹100 for all categories. Apply at

application_fee.details: The application fee for the Bihar Home Guard Company Commander recruitment is uniform across all categories. Payment must be made online only — via Net Banking, Credit Card, Debit Card, or UPI. No other payment mode is accepted. | Bank transaction charges for Credit/Debit Card or Net Banking will be borne by the candidate. The application fee is non-refundable once successfully paid. If an amount is deducted but registration fails due to a power/internet failure, the amount will be refunded by the Payment Gateway within 7 working days.

qualification.details: Candidates must meet both educational and physical eligibility criteria to apply for the Bihar Home Guard Company Commander Vacancy 2026. All criteria are calculated with reference to the cut-off date of 01 August 2025. | The candidate must be an Indian national. Male, female, and third-gender (Kinnar/Kothi/Hijra/Transgender) candidates are all eligible to apply. | Candidates must have passed a Bachelor's Degree (Graduation) from a recognized university or an examination equivalent thereto as recognised by the State Government, on or before 01 August 2025. | Age is determined on the basis of the date of birth recorded in the Matriculation (10th) or equivalent certificate. Candidates wondering about age relaxation can note that SC/ST and Third-Gender candidates receive the maximum relaxation of up to 42 years. | No marks are awarded for height, chest, or weight, but candidates who fail to meet the prescribed minimums will be declared ineligible at the Physical Efficiency Test (PET) stage. | A minimum expansion of 5 cm is mandatory for all male candidates. Chest measurement is not applicable for female candidates. | All female candidates must have a minimum weight of 48 kg. | Physical standards and PET criteria for Kinnar/Kothi/Hijra/Transgender candidates shall be the same as applicable to Backward Class (BC) candidates. Gender shall be determined as per the certificate issued by the District Magistrate under the Transgender Persons (Protection of Rights) Rules, 2020. | DON'T MISSRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Posts • Technician • RRB29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Vacancies • Nursing Officer13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Openings • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,318 postsKSP Civil Police Constable Online Form 20263,991 Vacancies • Civil Police Constable • KSP03 Jul 20263,991 postsMPSC 2619 Group C Online Form 20262,619 Openings • Group C17 Jul 20262,619 posts

salary_details.details: Selected candidates will be appointed at Pay Level-6 under the Bihar Home Guard Service Cadre. The exact pay matrix amount at Level-6 follows the state government's 7th Pay Commission structure applicable to Bihar state employees. | In addition to the basic pay at Level-6, selected candidates will receive other allowances as applicable to Bihar state government employees. The notification does not specify the exact basic pay figure; refer to the Bihar Pay Matrix for Level-6 details.

selection_process: Paper Subject Marks Questions Duration Minimum Qualifying Marks
Paper I General Hindi 200 100 2 Hours 30% (marks NOT counted in merit)
Paper II General Studies, General Science, Civics, Indian History, Indian Geography, Mathematics & Mental Ability 200 100 2 Hours Counted for merit
Event Male Standard Female Standard
Run 1 mile (1.6 km) in 6 min 30 sec 1 km in 6 minutes
High Jump Minimum 4 feet Minimum 3 feet
Long Jump Minimum 12 feet Minimum 9 feet
Shot Put 16-pound shot, minimum 16 feet 12-pound shot, minimum 10 feet
The selection for the Bihar Home Guard Company Commander post is conducted through three stages: a Preliminary Written Exam
a Main Written Exam

and a Physical Efficiency Test (PET). Only candidates who clear each stage proceed to the next. The overall recruitment process is expected to take approximately 6 months from the close of applications.

The Preliminary Exam consists of 1 paper of 200 marks with 100 objective (multiple-choice) questions to be completed in 2 hours. Questions cover General Knowledge and Current Affairs. Candidates scoring below 30% marks in the Preliminary Exam will be declared ineligible for the Main Exam. Candidates equal to 20 times the number of vacancies (category-wise
merit order) will be shortlisted for the Main Exam. If the number of shortlisted candidates is insufficient
this ratio may be reduced appropriately. If applications received are large enough
the exam may be held in multiple shifts/sessions; in such cases
marks will be normalised using the Equi-Percentile Method.
The Main Exam comprises two papers
both objective (MCQ) type:

Important: General Hindi (Paper I) marks are qualifying in nature and will not be added to the merit list. Only Paper II marks determine the merit. A negative marking of 0.2 marks applies for every wrong answer in both papers. Answer booklets will be in duplicate; one copy will be retained by BPSSC. Candidates equal to 6 times the number of vacancies (category-wise
merit order) will be called for the PET.

Candidates shortlisted after the Main Exam must qualify the following physical events. PET is qualifying only — no marks are added to the merit list. Candidates must individually pass every event. A maximum of 3 attempts is allowed for High Jump
Long Jump
and Shot Put. If a candidate completes the Run within the time limit but fails any other event
they are not given another opportunity in the remaining events.
Before final appointment
all selected candidates will undergo a medical examination
character verification
and antecedent verification as per prescribed rules by the appointing authority. Candidates with adverse reports or those found to have concealed facts will be declared ineligible.
The final merit list will be prepared category-wise based on Main Exam (Paper II) marks only. In case of a tie in marks
the older candidate (senior in age) will be ranked higher. If age is also equal
the candidate with higher educational qualification will rank above. If educational qualification is also equal
ranking will be based on alphabetical order of names in English as per their Class 10 certificate. Minimum qualifying marks for the final merit list are: General – 40%
EBC – 34%
SC/ST/Women – 32%. BPSSC will forward the names of finally selected candidates to the Deputy Inspector General–cum–Deputy Commandant General
Bihar Home Guard
Patna for appointment.

faq.question: Q1. Has BPSSC officially released the Bihar Home Guard Company Commander Recruitment 2026 notification?
faq.answer: Yes. BPSSC has officially released the Bihar Home Guard Company Commander Recruitment 2026 notification vide Advertisement No. 08/2026 on 25 June 2026, inviting online applications for 65 vacancies of Gulm Samadeshak (Company Commander) under the Bihar Home Guard Service Cadre.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for Bihar Home Guard Company Commander Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online is 30 July 2026. No extension of this deadline will be granted under any circumstances. The online application window opens on 30 June 2026.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available in BPSSC Home Guard Company Commander Bharti 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 65 vacancies are available for the post of Gulm Samadeshak (Company Commander). These are distributed across General (26), SC (10), ST (01), EBC (12), BC (07), EWS (07), and BC Women (02) categories.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for Bihar Home Guard Gulm Samadeshak Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a Bachelor's Degree (Graduation) from a recognized university or an equivalent examination recognised by the Bihar State Government, completed on or before 01 August 2025.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for Bihar Home Guard Company Commander Vacancy 2026?
faq.answer: The minimum age is 20 years for all categories. The maximum age is 37 years for General males, 40 years for General females and BC/EBC candidates, and 42 years for SC/ST candidates and Third-Gender candidates. All ages are calculated as on 01 August 2025.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for BPSSC Bihar Home Guard Company Commander Apply Online 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee is ₹100 for all categories including General, SC, ST, OBC, EWS, male, female, and third gender. Payment must be made online through Net Banking, Credit/Debit Card, or UPI only.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for Bihar Home Guard Company Commander Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection consists of three stages: (1) Preliminary Written Exam (200 marks, 100 MCQs, 2 hours — General Knowledge & Current Affairs), (2) Main Written Exam (two papers — General Hindi qualifying paper, and General Studies merit paper, each 200 marks), and (3) Physical Efficiency Test (Run, High Jump, Long Jump, Shot Put). Final merit is based solely on Main Exam Paper II marks.

faq.question: Q8. Is there negative marking in the BPSSC Home Guard Company Commander exam?
faq.answer: Yes. A deduction of 0.2 marks applies for every incorrect answer in both the Preliminary Exam and the Main Exam. There is no negative marking for unattempted questions.

faq.question: Q9. What is the Pay Scale / Salary for Bihar Home Guard Company Commander post?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will be appointed at Pay Level-6 under the Bihar Home Guard Service Cadre as per the state government's pay matrix. Additional allowances as applicable to Bihar government employees will also be payable.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website to apply for BPSSC Bihar Home Guard Company Commander Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official website is https://bpssc.bihar.gov.in. Candidates must click on the "Home Guard" tab and then select the link for Advt. No. 08/2026 to begin the online application process.

title: BPSSC Bihar Home Guard Company Commander Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 65 Posts
